mapper.sql: select 'WORK_HOUR' as bill_type, wh_id as bill_id, wh_no as bill_no, proj_id, proj_name, node_id, node_name, category_id, category_name, work_cost as amount, work_hours, null as expense_type, status, submit_time, create_by as applicant, approve_time as post_time from wh_work_hour where del_flag = '0' and status in ('1', '2', '4') union all select 'REIMBURSEMENT' as bill_type, reimburse_id as bill_id, reimburse_no as bill_no, proj_id, proj_name, node_id, node_name, category_id, category_name, amount, null as work_hours, expense_type, status, submit_time, create_by as applicant, approve_time as post_time from exp_reimbursement where del_flag = '0' and status in ('1', '2', '4')
mapper.select:
select sum(case when status = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as pendingCount, sum(case when status = '2' then 1 else 0 end) as approvedCount, sum(case when status = '4' then 1 else 0 end) as postedCount, ifnull(sum(case when status = '1' then amount else 0 end), 0) as pendingAmount from (
) t
mapper.insert: insert into cost_posting_record(bill_type, bill_id, bill_no, proj_id, proj_name, node_id, node_name, category_id, category_name, amount, post_by, post_time, create_by, create_time) values(#{billType}, #{billId}, #{billNo}, #{projId}, #{projName}, #{nodeId}, #{nodeName}, #{categoryId}, #{categoryName}, #{amount}, #{postBy}, #{postTime}, #{createBy}, now())
mapper.select: select count(1) from cost_posting_record where bill_type = #{billType} and bill_id = #{billId}
